name: 98 Gangster Crips
description: Gangster Crips are an African American street gang in Los Angeles, California founded in the 1980’s under the Gangster Crips, East Side Crip card. They are considered rivals of the Denver Lane Bloods, Hoover Criminals (in particular the 92 and 94 set), 98 Main Street Mafia Crips and the Eight Tray Gangster Crips.
